summary: Iteration 67 - NeXify AI Chat Bug Fixes Verification. ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Chat bubble flickering fix (CSS animation-iteration-count:1), 2) Server-side tool execution (tools execute on backend, results streamed), 3) Smart scroll behavior, 4) Stable message keys (no array index), 5) Session persistence via localStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NeXify AI Chat bug fixes verified. CSS animation-iteration-count:1 prevents flickering. Server-side tool execution working (tools called via backend, results streamed). Smart scroll preserves user position. Stable message keys prevent re-animation.

chat_bubble_flickering_fix.test_result: All 4 messages in loaded conversation have animation-iteration-count=1

server_side_tool_execution.details: Tools execute on backend via _run_tool() function, results streamed via follow_content events
api_endpoints: POST /api/admin/nexify-ai/chat - Streaming with server-side tool loop
server_side_tool_execution.observed_behavior: AI called self_status, system_stats, list_agents, audit_log, search_brain - all executed server-side

smart_scroll_behavior.details: nxScrollToBottom() checks if user is near bottom before auto-scrolling
smart_scroll_behavior.test_result: Scroll position preserved when user scrolls up

stable_message_keys.details: Messages use m._key || m.message_id || `msg_${i}_${m.created_at}` as React key
stable_message_keys.test_result: Messages render without re-triggering animation on re-render

session_persistence.details: Active conversation stored in localStorage as 'nx_active_convo'
session_persistence.test_result: localStorage.getItem('nx_active_convo') returns conversation ID after selection

bug_1_flickering.description: Chat bubbles blinked/flickered on every re-render
bug_1_flickering.root_cause: CSS animation without iteration-count limit + React key=index

bug_2_tool_execution.description: AI called JSON/Tool blocks and couldn't respond afterwards
bug_2_tool_execution.root_cause: Frontend tried to execute tools client-side instead of server-side
bug_2_tool_execution.fix: Server-side tool execution loop in backend with follow-up streaming

bug_3_scroll_behavior.description: Chat scrolled uncontrollably upward when typing
bug_3_scroll_behavior.root_cause: Auto-scroll triggered regardless of user scroll position
bug_3_scroll_behavior.fix: Smart scroll - only auto-scroll when near bottom

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Arcee AI trinity-large-preview, mem0 Brain)

playwright_test_results.admin_login_flow: PASS - Email → Role Selection → Password → Dashboard
playwright_test_results.chat_ui_loads: PASS - nxai-chat container, sidebar, input area all visible
playwright_test_results.send_message: PASS - Message sent, streaming response received
playwright_test_results.tool_execution: PASS - Tools executed server-side, results displayed
playwright_test_results.conversation_loading: PASS - 4 messages loaded from existing conversation
playwright_test_results.message_keys_stable: PASS - All messages have animation-iteration-count=1 (no re-animation)

console_warnings: React Router Future Flag Warning (v7_startTransition) - Not a bug, just deprecation notice
CORS error for ipapi.co/json - External service, not critical
